zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Somerville於1329年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath39歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Douglas24歲。他於大約1345年與Janet Preston在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1380年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾凱爾索享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Somerville于1329年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath39岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Douglas24岁。他于大约1345年与Janet Preston在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1380年在英国苏格兰洛包爾凱爾索享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛包爾。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Somerville was born in 1329, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, was 39 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, was 24. He married Janet Preston about 1345, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1380, in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Somerville est né en 1329, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Janet Preston environ 1345, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1380, à Kelso, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Somerville 1329 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath 39 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Douglas 24. Er hat um 1345 in Scotland Janet Preston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Somerville è nato il nel 1329 nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Janet Preston circa 1345, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1380, nel Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Somervilleが1329年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwathは39歳，母Lady Elizabeth Douglasは24歳であった。約1345年にスコットランドでJanet Prestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1380年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアケルソで51歳で死去し，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Somerville(이)가 1329년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Douglas(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1345년 스컷랜드에서 Janet Preston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 켈소에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Somerville nasceu em 1329, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Preston aproximadamente 1345, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1380, em Kelso, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Somerville родился в 1329 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Douglas, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Preston около 1345 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности келсо, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Somerville nació en 1329, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Janet Preston aproximadamente 1345, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1380, en Kelso, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Roxburghshire, Scotland.
